_comment: Dependency map for the Ralph loop orchestrator. Each workstream lists which phases/workstreams must complete before it can start.

phases.name: scaffolding
phases.description: Project bootstrap, Prisma schema + migration, auth, lib utilities, env config, CDC data, seed file, app shell pages, server functions, WebCal + CDC cron API routes

workstreams.name: core-api
workstreams.description: CRUD API routes for Profiles, Facilities, Locations, Doctors. Also owns src/types/index.ts Zod schemas.
workstreams.notes: Use assertProfileAccess from src/lib/permissions.ts. All routes must check session. Use server functions from src/server/* as the data layer — do not call prisma directly from routes.

workstreams.name: visits-medications-conditions-api
workstreams.description: CRUD API routes for Visits, Medications, MedicationLogs, and Conditions.
workstreams.notes: Medication logs support injection tracking (injectionSite, weight, dosage, unit). dueMonth format is YYYY-MM string.

workstreams.name: vaccinations-api
workstreams.description: CRUD API routes for Vaccinations. Also adds GET /api/vaccinations/recommendations endpoint.
workstreams.notes: Recommendations route calls getVaccinationRecommendations from src/server/vaccinations.ts. Calendar and CDC cron routes are already implemented in Phase 0.

workstreams.name: ui-shell-dashboard-profiles
workstreams.description: Profile switcher, dashboard widgets (real data), full Profiles CRUD UI.
workstreams.notes: Profile switcher reads activeProfileId from ProfileProvider context (already in src/components/layout/ProfileProvider.tsx). Dashboard widgets fetch from /api/* with the activeProfileId query param. Profile page shows calendarToken with a copy-to-clipboard button and a regenerate option.

workstreams.name: ui-healthcare-team-visits
workstreams.description: Healthcare Team page with Facility/Doctor CRUD, Visits list + CRUD forms.
workstreams.notes: Healthcare Team page groups active/inactive facilities and doctors. Visits page has status filter (PENDING, SCHEDULED, COMPLETED, CANCELLED). VisitForm has a date picker and a dueMonth field (type=month input).

workstreams.name: ui-medications-conditions-vaccinations
workstreams.description: Medications, Conditions, and Vaccinations CRUD UI + CDC compliance view.
workstreams.notes: MedicationLogForm captures: date, dosage, unit, injectionSite (dropdown), weight (lbs). Vaccination page shows two sections: recorded vaccinations and CDC compliance table. CdcComplianceRow uses color-coded status badges: green=up_to_date, amber=due, red=overdue, gray=not_applicable.

parallelExecutionGroups.note: All three API workstreams depend only on Phase 0 and can run fully in parallel

UI workstreams depend on Phase 0 + specific API workstreams. D can start when A is done. E can start when A+B are done. F can start when B+C are done. In practice, spin up all three together once A, B, C are done.
